title: A detailed 2D vector illustration die-cut sticker of a white modified 3rd-gen Toyota 4Runner parked on a grassy mountain plateau. The rooftop tent is deployed. Two passengers are sitting in camp chairs next to the vehicle, relaxing and sipping from mugs. Scenic background of distant peaks. Below the scene, the text "MOUNTAIN LIFE" is rendered in a large, bold, dynamic font with a golden-tan to dark brown gradient and a thick black outline (style from {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_165}}). A thick, clean white sticker border precisely traces the outer edges of the vehicle, tent, people, and text. Neutral grey background. Clean lines, scenic illustrative style, vibrant colors.

A detailed 2D vector illustration die-cut sticker design of an intense anime-style battle at the massive, intricately carved gates of Mary Geoise. Hundreds of Revolutionary Army soldiers clashing with heavily armored Marine guards. Buildings are crumbling. Background: chaotic, fiery sunset ocean. Text below: "GATES OF MARY GEOISE" in a bold, yellow-to-orange gradient font with a thick black outline. Thick clean white die-cut sticker border contouring all edges, neutral grey background. Cel-shaded, crisp vector art.

A detailed 2D vector illustration die-cut sticker of a white modified 3rd-generation Toyota 4Runner SUV with a driver and passenger inside, navigating a deep, muddy trail through a dense, tropical green jungle. The tires are splattering thick, chunky brown mud. Below the vehicle, the text "JUNGLE TREK" is rendered in a large, bold, dynamic font with a golden-tan to dark brown gradient and a thick black outline (style from {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_165}}). A thick, clean white sticker border precisely traces the outer edges of the vehicle, mud splashes, jungle foliage, and text, creating a custom irregular die-cut shape. Neutral grey background. Clean lines, cel-shaded coloring, vibrant colors, sticker aesthetic.

A detailed, high-angle 2D vector illustration die-cut sticker of a naval siege at the Red Port below Mary Geoise at sunset. The Thousand Sunny ship with its prominent Lion figurehead driving through dynamic whitecaps against armored Marine warships. Text below: "RED PORT BLOCKADE" in a bold, dynamic gradient font. Thick clean white die-cut sticker border, neutral grey background, cel-shaded.

A highly detailed 2D vector illustration die-cut sticker design of an epic duel on the central plaza of Mary Geoise at sunset. A green-haired swordsman stands against a rival. Background: a ship's main sail with a skull-and-crossbones emblem. Text below: "CELESTIAL DUEL" in a dynamic, gold-to-blue gradient font. Thick clean white die-cut sticker border, neutral grey background.

A detailed 2D vector illustration die-cut sticker of a white adventure motorcycle (BMW GS style) with a rider in full enduro gear (helmet, jacket) sitting on the bike. The bike is parked on a high desert plateau at sunset, with the rider looking out at a dramatic canyon view. Below the bike, the text "DESERT RIDER" is rendered in a large, bold, dynamic font with a golden-tan to dark brown gradient and a thick black outline (style from {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_165}}). A thick, clean white sticker border precisely traces the outer edges of the motorcycle, rider, and text, creating a custom irregular die-cut shape. Neutral grey background. Clean lines, vector art, vibrant warm colors.

A detailed vector illustration sticker in a circular badge style. A modified robust touring motorcycle with full crash protection, ADV tires, and a navigation tower, conquering a treacherous ice-covered mountain pass. Background: snow-capped peaks and a glacier valley. Text below: "ICE CONQUEROR" in a sharp icy blue and black font. Thick white sticker border, neutral grey background. Clean, graphic style, bold outlines, vibrant cool colors.

A detailed vector illustration sticker in a circular badge style. A classic robust 4x4 pickup truck with a custom flatbed conversion and heavy-duty towing mirrors, navigating a rough washboard desert track. Background: vast arid desert landscape. Text below: "BUILT FOR THE WILD" in a rugged, textured brown and black font. Thick white sticker border, neutral grey background. Clean, graphic style, bold outlines, vibrant cool colors.

A tense, high-angle 2D vector illustration die-cut sticker of a chaotic slave liberation inside Mary Geoise. A central figure with a straw hat and red open coat leading freed slaves against Marine guards. Background includes a woman with goggles and a small chibi reindeer. Text below: "SLAVE LIBERATION" in a bold, yellow-to-orange gradient font. Thick clean white die-cut sticker border, neutral grey background.

A detailed 2D vector illustration die-cut sticker design of a bright red Ferrari F8 with custom aerodynamic fins and massive alloy wheels. Driver and stylish passenger visible in the brightly lit cabin. The car is speeding aggressively on a modern elevated highway at night, leaving trailing speed lines and a burst of blue flame from the exhaust. Background: glowing futuristic metropolis and suspension bridge cables. Text below: "CITY APEX" in a bold, italicized, yellow-to-red gradient font with a thick black outline. Thick white die-cut border, neutral grey background, cel-shaded vector art.

A high-quality detailed vector illustration sticker, die-cut to follow the precise irregular outer contours of the design. The centerpiece is a white 3rd-generation Toyota 4Runner SUV, prepped for off-road with a steel bumper, LED bar, roof rack, and a tan rooftop tent. The vehicle is dynamically driving through and splashing mud on a dirt trail. The background features green pine trees and snowy mountain peaks. Below the vehicle, the text "OFF ROAD LIFE" is rendered in a bold, sporty tan and black block font. A thick, clean white sticker border precisely traces the outer edges of the vehicle, the mud splashes, the tree line, and the text, creating a custom irregular die-cut shape. The entire asset is set against a neutral grey background. Clean, graphic style with bold outlines and vibrant saturated colors. Reference {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_49}} and {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_7}} for the vehicle and background style.

A highly detailed 2D vector illustration die-cut sticker design of an intense battle on the ancient weapon plaza of Mary Geoise at sunset. A young man in a straw hat struggling against gravity as a colossal mechanical weapon activates. A dark-haired woman reading a book stands nearby amidst damaged buildings. Text below: "ANCIENT AWAKENING" in a bold, gold-to-red gradient font. Thick clean white die-cut sticker border, neutral grey background.

A detailed 2D vector illustration die-cut sticker design of a sleek neon-blue Lamborghini Aventador with a widebody kit, aggressive rear spoiler, and pink underglow. A driver wearing racing gloves is visible inside. The car is drifting around a corner at night, kicking up glowing water droplets from a rain-slicked asphalt street. Background: vibrant cyberpunk city skyline with skyscrapers and neon billboards. Text below: "MIDNIGHT DRIFTER" in a large, bold, dynamic, italicized font with a cyan-to-magenta gradient and thick black outline. Thick clean white die-cut border, neutral grey background. Cel-shaded coloring, badge style.

A detailed 2D vector illustration die-cut sticker design of a heavily tuned white Nissan GT-R R35 with a carbon fiber hood and bright green neon underglow. Driver intensely focused, shifting gears. The car is launching from a standstill at a city stoplight, with stylized smoke and burning rubber from rear tires. Background: glowing traffic lights and a bustling downtown street at night. Text below: "STREET KING" in a bold, toxic green-to-yellow gradient font. Thick white die-cut border, neutral grey background, cel-shaded.

A detailed vector illustration sticker in a circular badge style. A powerful, modified 4x4 pickup truck with a substantial lift kit, large mud-terrain tires, a snorkel, and a front winch, pushing through deep brown mud on a dense jungle trail. Background: lush green foliage and an ancient Mayan ruin. Text below: "MUD OR BUST" in a bold, rugged font with mud-splatter texture. Thick white sticker border, neutral grey background. Clean, graphic style, bold outlines, vibrant saturated colors.

A detailed 2D vector illustration die-cut sticker of a white modified 3rd-gen Toyota 4Runner power-sliding through a deep mud puddle in a rainy forest. Text below: "TUNNEL VELOCITY" in a sharp, blue-to-white gradient font with a black outline. Thick white die-cut sticker border, neutral grey background, vector graphic.

A detailed vector illustration sticker in a circular badge style. A detailed 2D vector illustration die-cut sticker design of an elegant two-tone blue Bugatti Chiron. Driver and passenger in evening wear visible inside. The car is cruising smoothly across a massive, brightly illuminated bridge at night, with stylized light beams from bridge pillars. Background: distant, glittering city skyline reflecting on dark water. Text below: "URBAN EXOTIC" in a sleek, silver-to-blue gradient font. A detailed 2D vector illustration die-cut sticker featuring a white modified 3rd-gen Toyota 4Runner parked on a desert track. A dramatic, low-angle 2D vector illustration die-cut sticker focusing on a fierce duel between a Sabo-like character with flame effects and a top CP0 agent on a tiled Mary Geoise rooftop at sunset. Swirling fire and energy columns. A damaged Lion-head ship figurehead visible nearby. Text below: "REVOLUTIONARY FLAME" in a bold, dynamic, italicized gradient font. Thick clean white die-cut sticker border, neutral grey background, crisp vector art.

A detailed vector illustration sticker in a circular badge style. A heavily modified iconic off-road SUV with an external roll cage, specialized rock-crawling suspension, beadlock wheels, and bright red paint, ascending a near-vertical red rock slab. Clean, graphic style, bold outlines, vibrant saturated colors.

A detailed vector illustration sticker in a circular badge style. An overlanding-equipped motorcycle with a touring windscreen, crash bars, and modular luggage, parked on a remote coastal cliffside. A detailed 2D vector illustration die-cut sticker design of an ultra-futuristic, sharp-angled hypercar in matte black with glowing cyan accents. Driver wearing tech-glasses gripping a glowing steering wheel. The car is doing a massive burnout, kicking up blue stylized tire smoke on a neon-grid street. Background: dense futuristic metropolis with holographic ads. Text below: "CYBER STREETS" in a jagged, cyan-to-purple gradient font. Thick white die-cut sticker border, neutral grey background, cel-shaded badge style.

A detailed vector illustration sticker in a circular badge style.
